inputs.label: Thrust (F)
inputs.businessContext: The thrust force produced by the engine.

inputs.label: Mass Flow Rate (ṁ)
inputs.businessContext: The rate at which propellant mass is expelled.

inputs.label: Standard Gravity (g₀)
inputs.businessContext: Standard acceleration due to gravity (9.80665 m/s²).

breakdown: Divide thrust by the product of mass flow rate and standard gravity.
